item.title: AVEVA Drug Delivery Systems, Inc.: Nicotine Transdermal System Patch, 14 mg, 14 patches per box, Aveva, Recall
item.product: Nicotine Transdermal System Patch, 14 mg, 14 patches per box, Aveva,
item.summary: Failed Impurities/Degradation Specifications: Elevated levels of oxidative-related impurities, exceeding shelf-life specifications during stability testing of individual units. Product details: Nicotine Transdermal System Patch, 14 mg, 14 patches per box, Aveva, Distributed by: RUGBY LABORATORIES, Indianapolis, IN 46268, www.majorpharmaceuticals.com, NDC 0536-5895-88.
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 59,808 pouches (4,272 Individual Folding Carton (IFC))
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
